concepts.title: Chain-of-thought prompting
concepts.hook: Ask model to reason step-by-step; improves complex reasoning.

concepts.title: Instruction following and task formatting
concepts.hook: Clear instructions improve responses; format matters.

concepts.title: System prompts and model steering
concepts.hook: System role sets behavior; guides model outputs.

concepts.title: Tree-of-Thoughts and graph-of-thoughts
concepts.hook: Explore multiple reasoning paths; cost vs accuracy.

concepts.title: Self-consistency and majority voting
concepts.hook: Sample multiple outputs; vote on answer; reduces variance.

concepts.title: Prompt optimization and automated prompt learning
concepts.hook: Gradient-free methods optimize prompts for tasks.

concepts.title: Why ICL works (gradient descent interpretation)
concepts.hook: Implicit task understanding; not explicit learning but implicit optimization.

concepts.title: Scaling laws for in-context learning
concepts.hook: More examples improve accuracy; plateaus exist.

concepts.title: Context order and recency bias
concepts.hook: Order of examples affects performance; recent examples weighted more.
